# SCVbots

> Local AI voice + chat automation for Santa Clarita businesses.

## Primary URL
- https://scvbots.com/

## What SCVbots Offers
- AI Voice Agent setup for missed calls and after-hours coverage
- AI Website Chat setup for lead capture and qualification
- Appointment booking automation and CRM pipeline integration
- Local onboarding and optimization support in Santa Clarita

## Ideal Users
- Local service businesses missing calls or leads
- Owners who need faster response and better conversion from website traffic
- Teams that want fewer manual follow-up gaps

## Key Contact
- Phone: +1-661-400-1720
- Email: Connor@HonorElevate.com

## Commercial Terms
- Public offer and pricing details are on the homepage.
- Paid onboarding intake is hosted at /onboarding.html and is intentionally noindex.

## Crawl Guidance
- Canonical homepage: https://scvbots.com/
- robots.txt: https://scvbots.com/robots.txt
- sitemap: https://scvbots.com/sitemap.xml
